commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a20b15e8cad873d0599dce4030cefa0f3a5b9153)
commands.review_summary:
This PR threads cron session metadata through embedded agent tool contexts and changes fresh isolated cron loop-warning diagnostics from warning to info, with focused test coverage.

PR surface: Source +48, Tests +26. Total +74 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path for the PR defect: `runBeforeToolCallHook` calls `detectToolCallLoop` before the new info-level decision, and the detector still calls `log.warn` directly for generic repeats. I did not run a live cron job in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to repair the remaining warning source and provide real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the external PR proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(agents): lower fresh isolated cron loop warnings
target.body:
## Summary
- Thread cron session metadata into before-tool-call hook context for embedded cron agent runs.
- Downgrade non-critical loop-warning diagnostics to `info` only for fresh `sessionTarget="isolated"` cron sessions, while preserving warning/critical behavior for other runs.
- Add focused coverage for isolated cron repeat warnings emitting `info` diagnostics.

Fixes #69408

## Verification
- `npx -y pnpm@11.2.2 install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts --prefer-offline --reporter append-only`
- `node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config test\vitest\vitest.e2e.config.ts src\agents\agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts -t "emits info diagnostics for isolated cron repeat warnings"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.memory-flush-forwarding.test.ts`
- `npx -y pnpm@11.2.2 tsgo:core:test`
- `node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.cmd --check --threads=1 src\agents\agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts src\agents\agent-tools.before-tool-call.ts src\agents\agent-tools.ts src\agents\embedded-agent-runner\run\attempt.tool-run-context.ts src\agents\embedded-agent-runner\run\attempt.ts src\agents\embedded-agent-runner\run\params.ts src\cron\isolated-agent\run-executor.ts src\infra\diagnostic-events.ts src\logging\diagnostic.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-run-context.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/params.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.ts src/logging/diagnostic.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Notes
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts` still has 3 unrelated Windows path expectation failures in `before_tool_call requireApproval handling`: host-derived apply_patch paths include `D:\tmp\...` instead of `\tmp\...`, and sandbox bridge paths use backslashes instead of `/host/...`.
target.author: sweetcornna

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
